page.title: Squads
page.empty_no_squads: No squads yet. Create one to get started.

add_member_dialog.title: Add Member
add_member_dialog.description: Add a workspace member or agent to this squad.

discard_changes_dialog.title: Discard unsaved changes?
discard_changes_dialog.description: You have unsaved changes on this tab. Switching tabs will discard them.

instructions_tab.description: Squad instructions are injected into the leader agent's prompt whenever it works on an issue assigned to this squad. Use them to give the leader squad-wide guidance, working agreements, or context the leader should follow on every task.

archive_dialog.title: Archive squad "{{name}}"?
archive_dialog.description_with_count_one: {{leader}} will take over {{count}} issue currently assigned to this squad (including closed ones). The squad will no longer appear in the workspace list, and this cannot be undone.
archive_dialog.description_with_count_other: {{leader}} will take over all {{count}} issues currently assigned to this squad (including closed ones). The squad will no longer appear in the workspace list, and this cannot be undone.
archive_dialog.description_no_count: {{leader}} will take over all issues currently assigned to this squad (including closed ones). The squad will no longer appear in the workspace list, and this cannot be undone.

role_editor.no_suggestions: No existing roles. Press Enter to add.
